title: Bamboo blocks to Charcoal Recipe
description: as the crafter is added in future versions of the game i thought smelting Bamboo blocks to Charcoal in a furnace would be a fun thing. it's not super efficient as you trade 9 bamboo for 1 charcoal but bamboo is so easy to farm.
body: Smelt bamboo blocks to charcoal in a furnace.
